blurb: Family Pizzeria serving pizza by the slice,  burra tacos, and local beef

story.title: The Las Animas Story
paragraphs: At Las Animas Pizza Company, we believe great pizza starts with great ingredients. That's why we use premium imported Italian flour, high-quality cheeses, and carefully selected toppings to create every pizza from scratch. More than just serving great food, we're proud to serve the Las Animas community with honest hospitality, exceptional quality, and a commitment to making every guest feel like family. Every pizza we make reflects our passion for craftsmanship and our dedication to the people we serve.

From Rocky Mountain elk sausage and locally raised Colorado beef to organic produce and premium Caputo "00" flour imported from Italy, we are committed to sourcing the finest ingredients available. Our dough is made with unbleached, unbromated Caputo "00" flour and undergoes a two-day cold fermentation, allowing it to develop exceptional flavor, texture, and character. We believe great pizza begins with great ingredients and time-honored techniques, and that commitment to quality is reflected in every slice we serve.

testimonials.quote: First time trying this place the TREX pizza was incredible the buffalo wings were really good if your ever in Trinidad or passing through I recommend stopping here the service was great
testimonials.author: Edward Scaggs

testimonials.quote:
Lunch
OMG, what a gem. The old town feel, big screen showing history of the town. Known for their pizza we shared between 3 of us, two orders of the Birria soft tacos and Brussel sprouts, excellent 😋
testimonials.author: Kevin Wheeler

testimonials.quote:
★★★★★
We stopped in after a long drive from Durango and were pleasantly surprised by this nice little pizza place in a historic spot. The salad and dressing was fresh and tasty. Pizzas were generously sized with a unique crispy crunch to the crust. We didn't get too adventurous with our selection; the sausage and pepperoni pizza did not disappoint.
The staff were efficient, friendly, and kept things moving even though it was a bustling Monday night. All the tables were full, and there was a steady stream of to-go orders. There are some non-pizza options as well!
Definitely on our list for another Colorado adventure! The kids got complimentary frozen fruit bars. A nice extra touch, especially when we cannot usually order dessert with food allergies!
testimonials.author: Christensen L.
